headline: How The Heritage Insurance Holdings (HRTG) Story Is Shifting With New Earnings And Valuation Assumptions
summary: The latest update lifts Heritage Insurance Holdings' price target from US$35.50 to US$36.50, a move that puts fresh attention on how analysts are recalibrating their assumptions. This shift is closely tied to revised earnings expectations and the way those updated EPS figures are feeding into current valuation work. Read on to see how these moving parts fit together and what to watch as the story continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our...
